sections.paragraph:
fem. נְבָלָה adj.-

(1) stupid, foolish, Pro 17:7, 21 Pro 17:21 Jer 17:11. More often-

(2) impious, abandoned, wicked (comp. אֱוִיל), 1Sa 25:25 2Sa 3:33 specially impious, ungodly. Job 2:10 Psa 14:1 53:2 , אָמַר נָבָל בְּלִבֹּו אֵין אֱלֹהִים “the fool saith in his heart, there is no God.” The Arabs use with the same extent of signification the word كافر.

(3) [Nabal], pr.n. m. 1Sa 25:3, seq.
